nasb.text: But Paul went down and fell upon him, and after embracing him, he said, “Do not be troubled, for his life is in him.”

esv.text: But Paul went down and bent over him, and taking him in his arms, said, “Do not be alarmed, for his life is in him.”

cnv.text: 保羅走下去，伏在他身上；把他抱住，說：“你們不要驚慌，他還活著。”

ccb.text: 保罗下去伏在他身上，抱着他对众人说：“不要惊慌，他还活着！”

csbs.text: 保罗下去，伏在他身上，抱着他说：“不要慌乱，他的灵魂还在身上！”
